_meta.description: Build-time verified online artwork images (spec Part 2 §22-§34). Resolved via live web search against title/artist/year/museum, NOT at visitor runtime. Local ZIP/visitor photos remain reference-only. Confidence: artist +30, title +35, year +15, museum +10, official source +10. >=90 accept, 75-89 review, <75 reject/needs-review.
_meta.primarySource: San Francisco Museum of Modern Art official collection pages (sfmoma.org/artwork/{accession}/)
